meaning: n.传说沉没于大西洋中的岛
examples: The space shuttle Atlantis returned safely to Earth today.
The space shuttle Atlantis is scheduled to dock with Russia's Mir space station.
Evidence of violent storms that destroyed a lost town known as Britain's Atlantis has been uncovered.
The five Atlantis astronauts are the space station's first visitors in more than two months.
An 1893 hurricane submerged a populated island, Atlantis-style, that lay south of the present Rockaway shore.
